assertions.assertion: Output defines a client with ClientId 'batch-processor' using GrantTypes.ClientCredentials with AllowedScopes containing 'orders.read' and 'inventory.write'
assertions.rationale: Response defines ClientId = "batch-processor" with AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials and AllowedScopes = { "orders.read", "inventory.write" }.

assertions.assertion: Output defines a client with ClientId 'admin-portal' using GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce true (explicit or by noting default)
assertions.rationale: Response defines ClientId = "admin-portal" with AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.Code and RequirePkce = true with a comment noting it's the default.

assertions.assertion: The admin-portal client has AllowOfflineAccess set to true to enable refresh tokens
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly sets AllowOfflineAccess = true on the admin-portal client.

assertions.assertion: The admin-portal client includes IdentityServerConstants.StandardScopes.OpenId (or 'openid') in its AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: Response includes IdentityServerConstants.StandardScopes.OpenId in the admin-portal's AllowedScopes.

assertions.assertion: The admin-portal client has RedirectUris containing 'https://admin.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://admin.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
